meta.description: Single source of truth for all Noble Architecture standard edge linework colours. Used by Na__EdgeUtil__PaintDeepNestedEdges to create SketchUp edge materials and populate the colour palette UI. Each MTE colour key becomes the SketchUp material name when applied to edges.
meta.namingConvention: Format: MTE{NNN}__{Category}__{Variant}. MTE prefix + 3-digit zero-padded number + __ + descriptor. The MTE prefix is required for the edge material lookup system to recognise an entry as indexed. The 'Default' key is a special reserved entry that resets the edge to SketchUp's default colour (no material created).

NamingRationale.Summary: Edge material names follow the same prefix-series pattern as face materials (MAT{NNN}__) to create a unified, parseable naming system across all Na__ material types.

PrefixBreakdown.M: Material - identifies this as a SketchUp material entity
PrefixBreakdown.T: Type - second character for sub-type qualification
PrefixBreakdown.E: Edge - specifies this material is used on edges, not faces

NamingRationale.NumberingLogic: 3-digit zero-padded sequential number (001-999). Series are organised in hundreds: MTE000__ = reserved/default, MTE100__ = greyscale series, MTE200__ = accent colour series. This mirrors the MAT series structure (MAT000__, MAT100__, MAT300__, etc.) and leaves full hundreds free for future series expansion.
NamingRationale.ComparisonToMAT: MAT{NNN}__ is used for face/surface materials. MTE{NNN}__ is used for edge/linework materials. Both share the same structural rules: prefix + 3-digit number + __ + category + __ + variant. This makes regex detection trivial and keeps the SketchUp materials palette sorted and grouped consistently.
NamingRationale.PreviousFormat: The original format was '00_XX__LineColour__Descriptor' (e.g. 00_01__LineColour__AbsoluteBlack). This has been superseded by MTE{NNN}__ in version 2.0.0 of this file. Any existing SketchUp models using the old material names will need a one-time migration to the new MTE names.

Default.Description: Reserved key - resets edge to SketchUp default colour. No material is created in the model.

MTE101__LineColour__AbsoluteBlack.Description: Absolute black - full ink weight linework
